title: Pan-Seared Bass with Greek Gooey Sauce
description: A moist and flavorful bass dish with a gooey Greek-inspired sauce, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the bass fillets with salt and black pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the bass for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the bass is cooking, mix together the Greek yogurt, lemon juice, honey, and dill in a small bowl.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top each bass fillet with a spoonful of the yogurt sauce.
Return the skillet to the stovetop and reduce the heat to low. Simmer the sauce over low heat for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
